rationale: Stage 1 local diagnosis points to a search-first rewrite. On the fixed local HDF5 screen, raising ef from 64 to 160 did not improve recall@10, but it roughly doubled visited nodes and distance calls. That pattern suggests the next major pure-Rust HNSW rewrite should first unify and cheapen the generic search kernel instead of assuming graph quality is the primary limiter.
next_plan: Create a search-first implementation plan around one shared idx-based traversal core for unfiltered and filtered HNSW search.
